creator: raimeetravel
caption:
These rules are why I’ve had the best solo travel experiences! Especially number 2!! 

My @AMD laptop is the best companion on these trips (especially since I’m always working on the go!) 

#AMDPartner #solotravel #solofemaletraveler #safety

transcription.text: i know i'm going to be safe every time i solo travel because i travel with this laptop and i followed these rules. rule number one, and this is my favorite, i lie. i do not tell strangers when i'm alone. i will say i am with my boyfriend or my family even if i'm completely solo. rule number two, i always walk around like i know where i'm going even when i don't. my next rule is i skip public wi-fi. i prep everything on my amd laptop before i go. i download maps, save documents, organize my itinerary, so everything's secure offline and ready when i land. and having the right laptop when you travel is very important. this one is super fast for multitasking, it's secure, it has a long battery, and it's light enough to keep me organized on the go. and then here are my final two solo travel safety rules. i keep all of my valuables in separate bags so that if one thing gets lost or stolen i always have a backup and i always listen to my gut. if something feels off i will leave right away. here are some of my favorite countries to solo travel in. hope you have the best trip. comment amd if you want the same laptop as me.
